blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,958 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
